chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1634 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 07.11.2016. Mr. Karamullah Memon, Advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Javed Akhtar o/b of DIG Hyderabad, SIP Nusrat Ali Baloch o/b of SHO P.S Kotri, SIP Syed Amir Hussain SHO o/b of SSP Jamshoro = The main grievance of the petitioner is that private respondents are causing him continuous harassment merely on the excuse that one of his relatives has married a relative of respondent No.13. Petitioner’s Counsel states that the present petitioner has no role or nexus in such marriage. Learned A.A.G files parawise comments on behalf of official respondents, in which a history of litigation between the parties is mentioned and it is not denied that one Mst. Wakeelan and Atiq-ur-Rehman did contract a marriage earlier. In these circumstances, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law, while private respondents are further directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. Copy of this order be provided to the learned A.A.G Sindh for compliance and copy of this order shall also be served upon private respondents by the concerned SHO and compliance whereof will be submitted to the Additional Registrar of this Court within two weeks from today. With these observations, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
